title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Vishal Mega Mart

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Vishal Mega Mart
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vishal Mega Mart! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vishal Mega Mart:
Vishal Mega Mart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
